facebook.caption:
2,804 reviews. 4.4 stars. And somehow Seashells Phu Quoc Hotel & Spa still flies under most tourists' radar.

Private beach area. Free breakfast. Spa. Pool. All on 01 Võ Thị Sáu, steps from the action.

The rooms are sharp, the vibe is chic without feeling cold, and breakfast is already handled before you hit the beach.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
